_about: Inversion identities: the same four notes named from two different roots. Intervals in semitones from the first chord's root to the second's.
consequences: m7 chords ride the rail of their relative major 6th (EΓש¡6 rail for Cm7).
m7Γש¡5 chords ride the rail of their relative minor 6th (EΓש¡m6 rail for Cm7Γש¡5).
A V6 little chord over the iii bass = iiim7 (F6/D = Dm7 in BΓש¡).
